title: How did Yui die
wikitext:
[]: How did Yui die?             Quote Post by Chelsey » Sun Jan 12, 2014 9:42 pm Maybe I missed something here, but I'm rewatching the anime and her death is only described as a "tragic accident." However, from context, the episode when Shinji is absorbed into Unit-01, Ritsuko talks about how her mom tried to retrieve someone absorbed into an Eva, but that attempt failed. Was that Yui? If so, was Unit-01 existing at that time? I thought they were still working on the prototype around when she died.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Jan 12, 2014 10:47 pm Yui partook in Eva-01's contact experiment in 2004. Her body was destroyed and her soul became that of the Eva's. (As such, Yui isn't really dead; she just changed residence.) Yui got herself absorbed knowingly, but only Fuyutsuki was aware of her intentions at the time, so it was declared an accident (and Gendo was tried for Yui's death). An attempt was made in 2005 to salvage Yui from the Eva -- recreate her body and fix her soul inside it -- but Yui refused to budge from Eva-01's core, so the salvage failed.

[]:             Quote Post by Chelsey » Sun Jan 19, 2014 11:02 pm Sorry for my late reply. Why would Yui want to be absorbed into the Eva? From what we saw with Shinji, it didn't look like a very fun experience. Did she know that Eva-01 would become instrumental later? ...Ok, well obviously she can't predict the future, but hopefully you understand my point.

[]:             Quote Post by Sephizim » Sun Jan 19, 2014 11:59 pm Well, she could predict the future so far what the Dead Sea Scrolls predicted, AKA Seele's scenario. She did it to ensure that she could protect Shinji when he was ultimately used as a pilot. What's debatable is whether or not she knew how Gendo would react, you know, with the whole going rogue from Seele and creating his own scenario thing. I mean, nobody knew how things would turn out in EoE, but I think Yui knew she could do more to protect Shinji by being the resident soul in the EVA. Then again, I might not be completely on track here. I'm not nearly as seasoned as some of the veterans here.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Mon Jan 20, 2014 3:23 am There's all the information you want and more on the wiki, here : http://wiki.evageeks.org/Yui_Ikari

If so, was Unit-01 existing at that time? I thought they were still working on the prototype around when she died.
